name: Air / Solo - Glass Mouthpiece With Tip
summary: Air / Solo - Glass Mouthpiece With Tip — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: The Air / Solo Glass Aroma Tip is designed for a smooth and effortless vaping experience with Arizer models - Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Air Max, Air SE, or Solo 2. It easily attaches to the mouthpiece and provides a perfect fit for all mentioned models. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
